title: MightyKids, Families & Community (MightyKFC)
text:
MightyKids, Families & Community (MightyKFC) - SupportGoWhere
MightyKids, Families & Community (MightyKFC)
Share link
MightyKFC is a developmental mentoring programme that aims to nurture at-risk children and youth in the Telok Blangah region.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Free
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

MightyKFC is a developmental mentoring programme with the following service components:

Centre based activities

Life skills workshops

Individual mentoring

Community service

Parent-child bonding session

Who is this for?

Latchkey children and youth from the lower income group, aged 6-14 years old.

What to expect?

An intake interview will be arranged to register for the programme.

Upon successful registration, services will be provided to the service users for the duration of the programme at the activity centre.

How to apply?

You may:

Walk into the centre

Email to mkfc@life-community.org

Call the centre at 6270 7198

Information last updated on 11 Sep 2025
